name: Toddler Crinkle Bow Gingham Floral Kids' Comforter - Pillowfort™
description: This Crinkle Bow Gingham Floral Comforter from Pillowfort™ is the perfect pick to infuse welcoming vibes and warmth into your toddler's bedroom. Made from a recycled polyester-spandex blend with 100% recycled polyester backing and soft polyester filling, this set provides year-round cozy warmth. It showcases a vibrant floral-pattern top with red-checkered ruffle trimming and a crinkly white reverse adorned with red checkered patch stripes and bow ends. Plus, the machine-washable construction allows for hassle-free cleaning.
